case_title: JEANNE EBER VS. PRECISION ENGINEERING, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PRECISION ENGINEERING, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($55.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED FEB-27-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PRECISION ENGINEERING, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-19-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY FINBAR BRODY--PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,370.00 FILED BY EBER, JEANNE AS TO DEFENDANT PRECISION ENGINEERING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
